# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-06-01'
      name: functionapp
      type: Microsoft.Web/serverlessfunctions
      properties:
        location: eastus
        managedDependencyIdentities:
          - '{ "type": "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity", "name": "<managed_identity_resource_name>" }'
        sku:
          name: Y1
          tier: Consumption
        functions:
          - name: functionname
            properties:
              functionsSize: 1.5
              authSettings: null
              extendedLocation: eastus
              packageUri: '<package_url>'

    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      name: managedIdentity
      type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
      properties:
        location: eastus
        userAssignable: true
        tags: {}
        properties: {}

    - apiVersion: '2016-06-01'
      name: storageAccount
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku:
          name: Standard_LRS
        kind: StorageV2

    - apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
      name: storageAccountContributor
      type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
      properties:
        scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/<storage_account>'
        principalId: '<managed_identity_principal_id>'
        data:
          role: 'Storage Account Contributor'

    - apiVersion: '2016-10-01'
      name: keyVault
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku:
          name: standard

    - apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
      name: keyVaultContributor
      type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
      properties:
        scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/<key_vault>'
        principalId: '<managed_identity_principal_id>'
        data:
          role: 'Key Vault Contributor'

    - apiVersion: '2014-12-01'
      name: sqlServer
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
      properties:
        location: eastus
        version: 12.0
        administratorLogin: '<admin_login>'
        administratorLoginPassword: '<admin_password>'

    - apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
      name: sqlServerContributor
      type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
      properties:
        scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/<sql_server>'
        principalId: '<managed_identity_principal_id>'
        data:
          role: 'SQL Server Contributor'

    - apiVersion: '2018-12-01'
      name: cosmosdbAccount
      type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
      properties:
        location: eastus
        kind: GlobalDocumentDB
        consistencyPolicy:
          defaultConsistencyLevel: Session

    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      name: cosmosDbContributor
      type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
      properties:
        scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/<cosmosdb_account>'
        principalId: '<managed_identity_principal_id>'
        data:
          role: 'Cosmos DB Data Contributor'
